reviews.review_title: I like the photo-realistic feel of it
reviews.review_description: The perfect application for creating an art gallery of my portfolio and inviting people to look at it.

developer_response.body: Psst...Have you tried the new gallery spaces?

reviews.review_description: Great first release and beyond expectation for an Early Access Alpha!

This is a great app for collaboration and creative brainstorming with your team. I’ve used plenty of social and collaborative spaces but the team at rethink has designed spaces with easy-to-follow instructions to help with design sessions. Can’t wait to see what they’re adding next!
We use ReThink to bring our remote workforce together and it is the best thing we’ve ever done.  Our meeting are more productive and they feel as close to in person as you can get.

developer_response.body: Right on! Thank you for the review and the opportunity to make reTHINK even better.

reviews.review_description: I am a Creative Director and our office works remote around the world. ReTHINK has made it extremely effective for us to get into meetings and map out our strategies using visuals and other tools within the app. It brings the “in person” aspect that many do not have anymore, back to life. Energy and productivity are already on the rise. A must get.

developer_response.body: Amazing that reTHINK is impacting in a great way. Always happy for constructive feedback, suggestions for feature ideas and improvements. We are a small but mighty team!
